$comment: compose: build a multi-file Go module from a directory of .spec files in <ws>/specs. read all specs -> model PLANS the build order + canonical contracts -> extract an ordered worklist -> foreach generates each unit in dependency order against the module so far (contracts accumulate; module_api keeps names exact) -> build AND test the whole module. Run with --ws <project>; scaffold it first via `/do new_module <project>` and drop specs in workspaces/<project>/specs. proj = $workspace.
summary: Compose a Go module from a dir of specs: plan the build order, generate each unit in dependency order against the accumulated module, then build and test the whole thing.
